name: lodestar
description: Self-hosted student life OS — tasks, calendar, study pacing, notes, backlog, watchers, one assistant.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @lodestar/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @lodestar/server dev" "pnpm --filter @lodestar/web dev"
